## ⏱️ Time Estimate
- [ ] Quick - < 1 hour
- [ ] Short - 1-4 hours
- [ ] Medium - 1 day
- [ ] Long - 2-3 days
- [ ] Extended - 1 week+

## 🎯 Priority
- [ ] Urgent - Do now
- [ ] High - Do today/this week
- [ ] Medium - Do this sprint
- [ ] Low - Backlog
